narrative: Markets digested the end of the 43-day U.S. government shutdown—the longest in history—with initial relief rally early in the week. However, profit-taking in overvalued AI/tech stocks amid rising Treasury yields and fading Fed cut odds led to late-week volatility, with mixed index performance. Rotation into value/small-caps provided support as growth names underperformed.[YCharts recap](https://x.com/ycharts/status/1990432874051285160), [Investopedia](https://www.investopedia.com/dow-jones-today-11142025-11849502), [WSJ](https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/stock-market-today-dow-sp-500-nasdaq-11-14-2025)

value_picks.name: Lyft, Inc.
value_picks.why_undervalued: Lyft was trading well below its peak earlier in the year, with the Nov. 14, 2025 close around $23.73 per share.
value_picks.bull_case: Operating leverage from improving ride-share pricing and cost discipline could drive sustained free cash flow and a re-rating if demand remains resilient.

value_picks.name: Phibro Animal Health Corporation
value_picks.why_undervalued: PAHC closed around $45.10 on Nov. 14, 2025 after a volatile post-earnings move, leaving it below its 52-week high range reported by market data providers.
value_picks.bull_case: If animal health volumes normalize and margin initiatives hold, earnings could compound and the multiple could revert closer to peers.

value_picks.name: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated
value_picks.why_undervalued: Regional banks like HBAN traded at compressed multiples amid rate/credit uncertainty, despite recurring earnings power and capital return capacity.
value_picks.bull_case: A stable credit environment plus improving funding costs could lift ROE and allow valuation to normalize toward historical levels.

value_picks.name: Old National Bancorp
value_picks.why_undervalued: ONB appeared on cash-flow-based undervaluation screens in early November 2025, suggesting the market was pricing in conservative assumptions.
value_picks.bull_case: If Midwest loan growth and fee income stay steady, ONB could deliver mid-teens total returns via dividends and buybacks.

value_picks.name: BioLife Solutions, Inc.
value_picks.why_undervalued: BLFS traded closer to the low end of its 52-week range during 2025, reflecting cautious sentiment toward life-sciences tools demand.
value_picks.bull_case: A rebound in cell & gene therapy funding and bioprocessing demand could expand revenue and improve free cash flow generation.

momentum_picks.name: NVIDIA Corporation
momentum_picks.catalyst: NVIDIA continued to benefit from AI infrastructure demand, with Zacks highlighting strong momentum characteristics in November 2025.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: High expectations and cyclicality make the stock sensitive to any slowdown in AI spending.

momentum_picks.name: Broadcom Inc.
momentum_picks.catalyst: Broadcom was highlighted by Forbes as a growth stock for November 2025 on strength in AI-related semiconductor revenue.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Execution risk around integrating acquisitions and sustaining AI networking demand could increase volatility.

momentum_picks.name: Applied Digital Corporation
momentum_picks.catalyst: Forbes flagged Applied Digital as a November 2025 growth name tied to AI-focused data center buildouts.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Still-profitable transition and capital intensity create downside if financing conditions tighten.

momentum_picks.name: MMTec, Inc.
momentum_picks.catalyst: StockTitan’s November 2025 monthly gainers ranking showed MTC leading with roughly +497% for the month, indicating extreme short-term momentum.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Micro-cap volatility and liquidity risk mean gains can reverse sharply.

momentum_picks.name: Olema Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
momentum_picks.catalyst: StockTitan’s monthly gainers list placed OLMA among the top November 2025 performers with roughly +236% gains, consistent with biotech breakout behavior.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Binary clinical/regulatory outcomes can drive large drawdowns despite strong momentum.

trends: End of historic government shutdown boosts sentiment but highlights data gaps.
AI/tech valuation reset amid rising yields.
Rotation to healthcare, energy, small-caps amid growth fatigue.
risks: Delayed economic data from shutdown raises recession fears.
Fed rate cut odds drop below 50%; yields at 4.15%.

watchlist_updates.detail: DoorDash shares surged 6% on Friday after announcing collaboration with Old Navy for on-demand clothing delivery.
Micron Technology rose 4.2% after Morgan Stanley named it a top pick citing rising memory chip prices from AI data center demand.
Warner Bros. Discovery climbed 4% amid reports of potential acquisition offers from Skydance, Comcast, Netflix.
Netflix dropped 3.6% on the last trading day before its stock split.
Nvidia shares rose nearly 1% ahead of earnings, hovering around $190 with strong AI expectations.

sources: [YCharts](https://x.com/ycharts/status/1990432874051285160), [Investopedia](https://www.investopedia.com/dow-jones-today-11142025-11849502), [AP News](https://apnews.com/article/wall-street-stocks-dow-nasdaq-8a8c36ff8bb88dec51da8483833c2914), [WSJ](https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/stock-market-today-dow-sp-500-nasdaq-11-14-2025), [Yahoo Finance](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/november-2025s-select-stocks-may-173819868.html), [Investopedia](https://www.investopedia.com/dow-jones-today-11142025-11849502), [Yahoo Finance](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/stock-market-news-nov-14-125300268.html), [WSJ](https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/stock-market-today-dow-sp-500-nasdaq-11-14-2025), [Yahoo Finance - LYFT historical prices](https://markets.financialcontent.com/talkmarkets/quote/historical?Symbol=LYFT), [Yahoo Finance - PAHC historical prices](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/PAHC/history/), [MarketWatch - PAHC quote](https://www.marketwatch.com/investing/stock/pahc), [Yahoo Finance - undervalued stocks Nov 2025](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/november-2025s-stocks-may-trading-113805462.html, [Zacks - Best Momentum Stocks Nov 12 2025](https://www.zacks.com/commentary/2789643/best-momentum-stocks-to-buy-for-nov-12), [Forbes - 3 Best Growth Stocks to Buy for November 2025](https://www.forbes.com/sites/investor-hub/article/3-best-growth-stocks-buy-november-2025/), [StockTitan - Monthly Gainers November 2025](https://www.stocktitan.net/rankings/stock-gains-monthly/2025/november)
